Live council updates · public, free, static

Cheshire East Council

Latest news, cleanly presented.

A dev-style public site that tracks the council’s latest media releases and surfaces them in a sharper, easier-to-scan format.

Source
Council media hub
Built from the public Cheshire East Council releases page and deployed to GitHub Pages for free.
Open council source Astro · GitHub Pages · Static build

What this is

  • Public, free GitHub Pages deployment
  • Astro static site
  • Professional dev-style layout
  • Latest council news surfaced cleanly

Next upgrade

If you want, I can later add category filters, a richer feed parser, or a tiny alert form for weekly updates.
